title: FLARE-VM terminal — pyinstxtractor.py crashes with bad magic number
html:
OSU — Yahir running pyinstxtractor on ned.exe inside FLARE-VM (Mandiant's malware-analysis Windows VM). Got ImportError: bad magic number in 'struct': b'\x03\xf3\r\n' — Python version mismatch between the host interpreter and the bytecode embedded in the EXE.

malware analysis lab · network forensics · python · osu
